differential_diagnoses: Echis ocellatus envenomation with systemic envenomation (hemotoxic)
Acute kidney injury (likely secondary to acute tubular necrosis or cortical necrosis)
next_steps: Fluid resuscitation and hematologic support with blood products (fresh frozen plasma, platelets, packed red blood cells)
Emergency obstetric consultation for evaluation of placental abruption and potential delivery
Urgent transfer to a facility capable of dialysis and comprehensive obstetric care
Laboratory monitoring of hemoglobin, platelet count, fibrinogen, and renal function
